description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compiler Tests that runs on a workflow dispatch trigger. The workflow has two jobs: all-compilers and latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds. The all-compilers job runs on a self-hosted Linux x64 environment with a matrix of images and opts, checks out the repository, and compiles gem5 with scons. The latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds job runs on a similar environment with a matrix of gem5 compilations, images, and opts, checks out the repository, and compiles gem5 with scons.
